title: Create a Copy To feature
excerpt: Can we get a “Copy To” feature similar to “Move To” that would allow you to copy an item with subitems to a new board or group? Currently I have to duplicate and them move which is done quite a bit. Automations are not i…

posts.author: jamie.james (JJames)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we get a “Copy To” feature similar to “Move To” that would allow you to copy an item with subitems to a new board or group? Currently I have to duplicate and them move which is done quite a bit. Automations are not ideal for this use case since they are not repeatable. We are looking for an on-demand feature to “Copy To”.
